kirundi.start_your_microphone_and_try_it_when_: Fungura mikoro yawe unayigerageze! Nurangiza, kanda "Uzuza."
kirundi.the_melody_of_your_speech_rising_pitch: Injyana y'imvugo yawe. Ubuhagarike bw'ijwi buzamuka = ibibazo, bumanuka = imvugo, ihindagurika = gushimangira.
kirundi.how_fast_you_are_speaking_in_words_per: Uko uvuga vuba, mu magambo ku munota.
kirundi.your_speaking_volume_and_steadiness_ov: Ubwinshi bw'ijwi ryawe uvuga n'uko rihamye mu gihe.
kirundi.good_speakers_use_pauses_aim_for_20_30: Abavugizi beza bakoresha guhagarara! Igamije 20-30% yo guhagarara mu mvugo yawe.
kirundi.analyzes_pause_patterns_syllable_rate_: Isesengura uburyo bwo guhagarara, guhamya kw'umuvuduko w'inyuguti, n'uko ijwi rihamye kugira ngo ikore amanota y'ubuhanga. Fata byibura amasegonda 10 y'imvugo, hanyuma ukande "Sesengura ubuhanga."
kirundi.analyze_fluency_from_current_recording: Sesengura ubuhanga uhereye ku makuru y'ifatwa ry'ubu
kirundi.visualizes_your_vowel_sounds_on_an_ipa: Igaragaza amajwi y'inyajwi zawe ku kadirali k'inyajwi ka IPA hakoreshejwe isesengura rya formant (F1/F2). Vuga inyajwi kandi urebe akadomo kegera kugira ngo kerekane aho inyajwi yawe igwa. Uburyo bw'inzira bugaragaza guhindukira kw'inyajwi ebyiri!
kirundi.green_circles_target_vowel_positions_o: Uduziga twicyatsi = ahantu h'inyajwi hagamijwe. Akadomo k'icunga = inyajwi yawe y'ubu. Inzira y'umuhengeri = guhindukira kw'inyajwi kwa vuba.
kirundi.recordings_are_automatically_saved_whe: Ifatwa ribikwa mu buryo bwikora iyo uhagaritse mikoro. Bisubiremo hamwe n'inyandiko y'injyana ihuje. Amafatwa 3 ya nyuma abikwa.
kirundi.no_recordings_yet_start_and_stop_the_m: Nta fatwa rirahaba. Fungura kandi uhagarike mikoro kugira ngo ubike ifatwa.
kirundi.select_first_recording_to_compare: Hitamo ifatwa rya mbere kugira ngo ugereranye
kirundi.select_second_recording_to_compare: Hitamo ifatwa rya kabiri kugira ngo ugereranye
kirundi.choose_an_exercise_type_the_tool_will_: Hitamo ubwoko bw'umwitozo. Igikoresho kizaguha interuro zo kwitoza hamwe n'igisubizo cy'injyana mu gihe nyacyo.
kirundi.say_this_phrase_with_the_emotion_below: Vuga iyi nteruro n'irangamutima riri hasi. Reba uko ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe n'ijwi bihinduka!
kirundi.say_the_phrase_with_this_feeling_notic: Vuga interuro n'iri rangamutima. Menya ibibaho ku buhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe!
kirundi.say_the_same_words_as_a_statement_pitc: Vuga amagambo amwe nk'imvugo (ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bumanuka ku iherezo) na nk'ikibazo (ubuhagarike bw'ijwi buzamuka). Reba itandukaniro ku igishushanyo cy'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi!
kirundi.the_same_sentence_means_different_thin: Interuro imwe isobanura ibintu bitandukanye bitewe n'ijambo ushimangira. Hitamo ijambo hasi, hanyuma uvuge interuro ushimangira iryo jambo.
kirundi.read_the_passage_below_at_the_target_s: Soma igika kiri hasi ku muvuduko ugamijwe. Igipimo cy'umuvuduko kizakwereka uko ugenda vuba!
kirundi.target_pitch_pattern_green_zone_target: Uburyo bw'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bugamijwe (agace k'icyatsi = kigamijwe, icunga = ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ryawe):
kirundi.say_the_phrase_now_try_to_match_the_gr: Vuga interuro ubu! Gerageza guhuza n'agace k'icyatsi kagamijwe.
kirundi.slps_use_specific_prosody_patterns_as_: Abaganga b'imvugo bakoresha uburyo bw'injyana bwihariye nk'intego z'ubuvuzi. Hitamo uburyo kugira ngo urebe umurongo w'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ugamijwe unawitoze kubuhuza.
kirundi.multilingual_pronunciation_lab: Laboratwari yo kuvuga mu ndimi nyinshi
kirundi.practice_pronunciation_in_any_language: Itoze kuvuga mu rurimi urwo ari rwo rwose! AI izakora urugero rw'interuro, hanyuma wowe ugerageze guhuza injyana yayo.
kirundi.or_type_any_language: Cyangwa andika ururimi urwo ari rwo rwose:
kirundi.hear_the_ai_model_speak_this_phrase: Yumva urugero rwa AI ruvuga iyi nteruro
kirundi.your_turn_speak_the_phrase_and_try_to_: Uruhara rwawe! Vuga interuro unagerageze guhuza uburyo bw'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi.
kirundi.dashed_line_model_solid_line_your_spee: Umurongo w'utudomo = urugero, umurongo wuzuye = imvugo yawe. Gerageza kubihuza!
kirundi.prosody_comparison_graph_showing_model: Igishushanyo cyo kugereranya injyana kigaragaza umukururo w'urugero n'umukururo w'imvugo yawe bishyizwe hejuru ya kimwe
kirundi.summary_of_your_practice_session_share: Incamake y'igihe cyawe cyo kwitoza. Sangiza umuganga wawe w'imvugo!
kirundi.generate_a_text_summary_of_this_sessio: Kora incamake y'inyandiko y'iki gihe ushobora gusangiza umuganga wawe w'imvugo.
kirundi.clear_all_session_data_and_start_fresh: Siba amakuru yose y'igihe utangire bushya
kirundi.go_back_to_stem_lab_tool_list: Subira ku rutonde rw'ibikoresho bya STEM Lab
kirundi.speech_prosody_visualization_for_slp_r: Kugaragaza injyana y'imvugo ku myitozo yasabwe n'umuganga w'imvugo
kirundi.live_visualizer_record_read_your_deliv: Kigaragaza kiriho — fata unasome iyerekana ryawe
kirundi.real_time_pitch_trace_volume_meter_fil: Gukurikirana ubuhagarike bw'ijwi mu gihe nyacyo + igipimo cy'ijwi + ikibara amagambo yuzuza. Abavugizi batojwe bahindura ubuhagarike bw'ijwi ~30% mu nteruro; iyerekana rirambuye ritakaza ubwitondere bw'umuteze amatwi mu ~masegonda 20.
kirundi.pacing_target_150_wpm_pauses_between_i: Intego y'umuvuduko ~amagambo 150/umunota. Guhagarara hagati y'ibitekerezo (amasegonda 1-2) bifite uburemere bungana n'amagambo. Banza usome ibyo wanditse mu ijwi riranguruye; interuro zidasobanutse zigaragara ako kanya.
kirundi.multilingual_same_speech_multiple_lang: Indimi nyinshi — imvugo imwe, indimi nyinshi
kirundi.speech_rate_varies_dramatically_by_lan: Umuvuduko w'imvugo utandukanye cyane bitewe n'ururimi: Icyesipanyoli + Ikiyapani ~ibyunguti 7/isegonda; Icyongereza ~6; Ikimandarini ~5. Umuvuduko w'amakuru urahamye hafi ya — indimi ziremereye zivugwa buhoro.
kirundi.pace_pitch_range_filler_word_density_p: Umuvuduko, urwego rw'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, ubwinshi bw'amagambo yuzuza, igihe cyo guhagarara — buri kimwe gihabwa amanota ugereranyije n'intego zishyigikiwe n'ubushakashatsi. Kanda ku gipimo icyo ari cyo cyose kugira ngo ubone isoko + inama y'ubwigishe.
kirundi.prosody_discover_how_delivery_shapes_m: Injyana — menya uko iyerekana rikora ibisobanuro
kirundi.adjust_pitch_offset_pace_and_volume_ga: Hindura ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, umuvuduko, no kongera ijwi, hanyuma wandike ibyo ubona. Nta manota, nta byahishuwe — kora igitekerezo cyawe ku mpamvu imvugo nyinshi za TED ziri hafi y'amagambo 150/umunota.
kirundi.default_for_most_speaking_natural_rhyt: Isanzwe ku mvugo nyinshi. Injyana karemano.
kirundi.adjust_pitch_offset_pacing_volume_disc: Hindura ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi, umuvuduko, ijwi. Igabanya ryihariye rya tempo 4. Nta manota, nta byahishuwe.
kirundi.hypothesis_how_does_pace_affect_audien: Igitekerezo: Umuvuduko ugira ingaruka ki ku kumva kw'abateze amatwi?
kirundi.most_ted_talks_are_150_wpm_investigate: Imvugo nyinshi za TED ni ~amagambo 150/umunota. Shakisha impamvu.
kirundi.when_does_pitch_variation_help_vs_dist: Ni ryari ihindagurika ry'ubuhagarike bw'ijwi rifasha kurwanya iyo rihungabanya?
kirundi.explain_how_prosody_shapes_oratory_imp: Sobanura uko injyana ikora ingaruka z'ubuvugizi.
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_tempo_marker_no: Icyitonderwa cy'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cyihariye cya tempo 4; nta manota y'iyerekana; nta byahishuwe — ku bushake.
kirundi.this_tool_is_designed_as_a_tier_1_clas: Iki gikoresho cyagenewe nk'igikorwa cyo mu ishuri cy'Urwego rwa 1. Ku buvuzi bw'imvugo bw'umuntu ku giti cye, nyamuneka gisha inama umuganga w'imvugo wemewe.
kirundi.visualizations_use_web_audio_api_pitch: Kugaragaza gukoresha kumenya ubuhagarike bw'ijwi bwa Web Audio API (isano-bwite) n'isesengura ry'ubugari. Gutunganya kose gukorwa mu buryo bw'aho muri mushakisha — nta jwi rifatwa cyangwa ryoherezwa.
